final_trading_notice: Final trading is manually decided by the user.
research_limitations: This report replays committed public ETF research artifacts only; it is not live trading evidence.
In-sample and out-of-sample scenarios are research robustness checks, not trade tickets or automatic order placement.
Final trading is manually decided by the user.

split_scenarios.description: Full, in-sample, and out-of-sample windows were generated for each Stage 3.1 strategy.
